format: JavaScript (Node.js module with embedded SQL string)
description: This file defines a function to return SQL statements that initialize a PostgreSQL database schema related to document metadata, extracted text, and persona management. It exports the function for external use, serving as a schema migration placeholder with detailed table creation scripts.

methods.name: getMigrationSql()
methods.description: Returns SQL statements for initializing the database schema related to documents, extracted text, personas, and persona versions.
